rows.label: tev016601_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Leland about his body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Leland if he's heard
any interesting rumors.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0001
rows.name:
You mean this young, virile Blue
Blood of mine? I had to go through
a lot of trouble to get it![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0002
rows.name:
There's some ridiculous rule that
everyone has to have a Blue Blood
that looks just like their real body.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0003
rows.name:
And if you tell the technicians you
want a younger one, they just insist
that it will confuse people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0004
rows.name:
I had to take my request all the way up the
chain of command, and after a great deal of
discussion, they finally gave me permission.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0005
rows.name:
I suppose I caused a lot of trouble for a lot of people,
but I won't give them cause to regret giving me back my
youth. I'm gonna mine all sorts of new ore for 'em![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0006
rows.name:
Cole Family Rule Number Three:
As long as a man is getting results
at work, everything's fine.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0009
rows.name:
A band of Larsians is living in a cave
somewhere in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0010
rows.name:
I heard that from some Nopon who live
in the region. What do you think
they're doing in a place like that?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0011
rows.name:
I can't explain it, but I know
they're strong fighters, so you'd
best be on guard around them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Leland if he has
any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0012
rows.name:
I saw a strange Larsian while I was
on a mission in Valley of Oblivion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0013
rows.name:
You know those ruins on the sandbank out there?
Well, I was over in that area when I saw the fellow
leaping at indigens and fighting them barehanded![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0014
rows.name:
He'd beat one silly for a few seconds, then
move on to the next. And he kept at it for
the entire time I was watching him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0015
rows.name:
I don't know if he was hunting
them or what, but whatever he was
doing, he's one tough bastard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask Leland if he has
any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0016
rows.name:
You know the Larsian I used to
see out in Valley of Oblivion? I
haven't seen him around lately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0017
rows.name:
From what I hear, he's traveling
around Mira and undertaking some
kind of training journey.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0018
rows.name:
I hope I get a chance to meet him
again. I really admire his spirit.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_SEL0051
rows.name:
Ask Leland if he has
any interesting news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0019
rows.name:
So the Larsian I always used to
see out in Valley of Oblivion?
Turns out his name is Gi Zang.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0020
rows.name:
I just happened to run into him the
other day on the Ma-non ship. Boy,
did we ever have lots to talk about![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0021
rows.name:
Apparently he really WAS
traveling throughout Mira and
training in different places.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016601_MSG0022
rows.name:
What spirit! If I didn't have my missions, I'd head
off on a geological survey and travel throughout
Mira like he did. No one holding me back! No, sir![ST:wait ]
